Total Credits

ADVISING

Advising is not mandatory for the Earth Material Properties Minor, however interested students are urged to consult with the Geology Director of Undergraduate Studies prior to declaring the minor to discuss academic planning and logistics. Contact information is available at the Geology web page http://geol.umd.edu.
